creditCard.name: Name
creditCard.updateCard: Update the Terms of This Card
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Verification is needed before your payment card is available for use. InterServer will charge your payment card with two amounts under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges will show up on your billing statement within a couple of minutes, usually under pending transactions. If you do not see these charges, please contact your payment card issuer for more details.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization charges are only for verification purposes and will be voided within 3-5 days, depending on your bank.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I accept two temporary charges under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Log in to your payment card's online banking or call your bank to verify the two amounts charged. They often show under Pending Charges. These authorization charges will disappear in about 3-5 days depending on your bank.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Please enter the two amounts charged to your payment card. The values must be in USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Please note that the charges on your payment card statement may be in a different currency from the one required on the last confirmation page described above. If your payment card statement does not display the original transaction amounts in the required currency, you will have to contact your payment card company. They should be able to tell you the amounts of the two charges in the original currency.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your payment card {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This card has been authenticated and enabled for use in our system.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Click here to switch on this payment card for use.
creditCard.removeCreditCard: Remove This Payment Card on File

pay.title: Settle Outstanding Debts
pay.creatingPaymentRequest: Creating Payment Request — just a moment...
